hero.desc: Km0 nutrition plans, herbology and personalized wellness, powered by artificial intelligence and rooted in the wisdom of the earth.

pillars.label: Our method
pillars.title: Four pillars for a truly balanced life

items.title: Local nutrition
items.desc: Local, seasonal and zero-kilometer food. Your body and the land you walk on share the same rhythm.

items.title: Real holistic profile
items.desc: Biometrics, habits, energy and goals. A wellness system built from your data, not generic statistics.

items.title: Plants & ancestral wisdom
items.desc: Herbology, macrobiotics and millenary traditions integrated into recommendations you can apply today.

items.title: Your plan. Your pace. Your life.
items.desc: Quantum unifies everything in a fully personalized daily plan. It organizes your calendar, sends reminders when you need them, adapts each recommendation to your budget and who you are — whether you're 17, carrying a baby or have 70 springs lived.

how.label: The process

steps.title: Create your holistic profile
steps.desc: 10 questions about your body, habits, environment and goals. In 5 minutes, your personalized wellness map.

steps.title: AI analyzes and connects
steps.desc: Nutritional science + local herbology + your data. The system builds a protocol no other user has.

steps.title: Receive your personalized plan
steps.desc: Weekly nutrition plan, plants for your area and rituals adapted to your profile, season and real goal.

steps.title: Evolve over time
steps.desc: The system learns with you. With Quantum Pro, you also speak directly with the specialist every month.

how.line1: Ancestral science validated by modern evidence
how.line2: Quantum technology applied to integral wellness

samplePlan.label: Monday · Detox
samplePlan.body: Nettle broth + brown rice with sesame

samplePlan.label: Recommended plant
samplePlan.body: Local rosemary · Digestion and mental clarity

samplePlan.label: Morning ritual
samplePlan.body: Warm water + lemon + fresh grated ginger

items.title: Monthly detox protocol
items.desc: A different cycle each month: detox, immune boost, regeneration. Adapted to your state, not a generic calendar.

items.title: Optimization for your profile
items.desc: Elite athlete, cognitive performance or vital balance. Techniques targeted exactly where you need them.

items.title: Video call with the specialist
items.desc: Monthly session to review your progress, adjust the protocol and resolve what no AI can handle alone.

items.title: Adaptive follow-up
items.desc: The system detects if you're in a stress, fatigue or peak phase. Adjusts the protocol automatically.

items.title: Unique skill enhancement
items.desc: Musician, athlete, entrepreneur or researcher: the plan boosts the specific capabilities your life requires.

items.title: Downloadable guides & resources
items.desc: Detox PDFs, seasonal recipe books, medicinal plant guides. AI-generated and specialist-reviewed.

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.title: Choose your path
pricing.note: No commitment · Cancel anytime · No card to start

footer.desc: Personalized km0 nutrition plans, herbology and holistic wellness powered by artificial intelligence.
